description: Referencing the classic sport shoe, the inspiration for this stylish piece comes from the idea that hardy shoes should not only feel good but also look good. Crafted from genuine suede and nubuck leather, this woodland shoe only gets better with age. The low-top styling, thick midsole and soft overlay make this shoe a closet essential. Wear this with tonal corduroy trousers and a polo t-shirt, or with denims and subtly hued monochrome tees. Upper Two-tone suede upper with nubuck overlays Central lace ups Padded tongue Pull loop at the heel Embossed branding on the midfoot and tongue Leather lining Padded insole for instep comfort Midsole Foam midsole for cushioned comfort Outsole Dual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede and nubuck brush Do not store in direct sunlight
